events.text: American Indian Wars: Battle of the Little Bighorn: 300 men of the U.S. 7th Cavalry Regiment under Lieutenant Colonel George Armstrong Custer are wiped out by 5,000 Lakota, Cheyenne and Arapaho, led by Sitting Bull and Crazy Horse.
World War II: The Battle of Tali-Ihantala, the largest battle ever fought in the Nordic countries, begins.
The breakup of Yugoslavia begins when Slovenia and Croatia declare their independence from Yugoslavia.
